prompts.text: 'Barcode' — the striped pattern that tells the scanner what an item is. 'Scan' — reading the barcode with the camera. 'Match' — the scanner checks the barcode matches what's on the list.
Before scanning each item, build anticipation: 'What do you think this one will be? Does the shape match what we're looking for?' — prediction before confirmation.
Core question throughout: 'How many items have we found? How many do we still need?' — counting with purpose, one-to-one correspondence in a real-world context.
Real-world connection: 'Where else have you seen barcodes? Can you find one on something in the house?' — environmental print and real-world observation.
